metadata.description: Deep-research and cache-first bundles for Claude Code. Contains parallect-cloud (hosted multi-provider research) and prxhub (verified .prx bundle registry).

plugins.name: parallect-cloud
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for parallect.ai (hosted). Runs multi-provider deep research on Parallect-managed infra (Perplexity, Gemini, OpenAI, Grok, Anthropic) and synthesizes reports with typed claims, confidence scores, and follow-on suggestions. OAuth-gated, paid. For BYOK / self-hosted, see parallect-cli on PyPI (parallect-local plugin coming soon).

plugins.name: prxhub
plugins.description: Cache-first access to the prxhub.com bundle registry. Search, download, cite, and publish verified .prx research bundles before spending compute on new research. Free to read, no account required.
